notes: all combat numbers are simulator output on unverified constants
checkpoint levels are provisional (no level timeline in the match feed)
evidence deltas carry finished-inventory survivorship bias

coachLine: Sim-optimal for skirmish uptime: first spike lands around minute 12 (Spectral Schematics), third item by minute 25. Take Demiurge: +12% on your burst combo at minute 15.

all.name: Marrow
all.note: Marrow (Major): missing-health-dependent omnivamp; no sustain-uptime model yet

all.name: Nihil
all.note: Nihil (Major): accrual rate depends on combat uptime (how long Doom persists per fight), which the closed-form sim cannot observe

all.name: Aion
all.note: Aion (Major): economy effect; valuable but outside combat objectives (revisit with gold curves)

all.name: Exarch
all.note: Exarch (Major): buffs the HEAL TARGET (usually an ally) — team-side value outside the single-hero sim; self-heal uptime depends on heal cadence vs the 4s window

augments.name: Crescendo
augments.note: chain-final basic bonus; chain length is unstated in our data

metaBuilds.whyLine: Strongest meta core for one-combo burst, online around minute 25 — about 819 damage in one combo in the sim.
metaBuilds.optimizer: Optimizer sees +43% more one-combo burst: try Spectral Schematics over Orb Of Growth (sim-only — the popular pick may carry utility the sim can't see; test it).

metaBuilds.whyLine: Strongest meta core for magical survivability, online around minute 25 — about 4,654 effective HP vs magical in the sim.
Strongest meta core for extended fights vs bruisers, online around minute 25 — about 3,689 damage over a 20s fight in the sim.
metaBuilds.optimizer: Optimizer sees +40% more extended fights vs bruisers: try Spectral Schematics over Megacosm (sim-only — the popular pick may carry utility the sim can't see; test it).

matchups.gameplan: You hold the kill-threat edge wherever one exists: play front-foot, but respect jungle attention.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Warden's Faith instead of Oblivion Crown: their 3s all-in loses 33% of its bite; you give up 24% of your damage.

matchups.gameplan: Respect their early kill threat; the exchange levels out later, so trade patiently and scale.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Warden's Faith instead of Oblivion Crown: their 3s all-in loses 36% of its bite; you give up 24% of your damage.

matchups.gameplan: Respect their early kill threat; the exchange levels out later, so trade patiently and scale.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Void Helm instead of Oblivion Crown: their 3s all-in loses 29% of its bite; you give up 24% of your damage.

matchups.gameplan: Survive the early checkpoints, concede even trades, and take over once your spike lands.
